# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release and Publish

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*.*.*'

permissions:
  contents: write
  packages: write

jobs:
  detect-language:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      has_npm: ${{ steps.check.outputs.has_npm }}
      has_pypi: ${{ steps.check.outputs.has_pypi }}
      version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Check for package managers
        id: check
        run: |
          if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            echo "has_npm=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "has_npm=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi
          
          if [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            echo "has_pypi=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "has_pypi=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

      - name: Extract version from tag
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "Version: $VERSION"

  build-npm:
    needs: detect-language
    if: needs.detect-language.outputs.has_npm == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
        continue-on-error: false

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: npm-dist
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            lib/
            package.json
            README.md
            LICENSE
          retention-days: 1

  build-python:
    needs: detect-language
    if: needs.detect-language.outputs.has_pypi == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
          cache: 'pip'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install build twine wheel setuptools

      - name: Install project dependencies
        run: |
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
          if [ -f requirements-dev.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements-dev.txt; fi
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          if [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -f setup.cfg ] || grep -q pytest pyproject.toml 2>/dev/null; then
            pip install pytest
            pytest
          elif [ -f setup.py ]; then
            python setup.py test
          fi
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Build package
        run: python -m build

      - name: Check distribution
        run: twine check dist/*

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-dist
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 1

  create-release:
    needs: [detect-language, build-npm, build-python]
    if: |
      always() && 
      (needs.build-npm.result == 'success' || needs.build-npm.result == 'skipped') &&
      (needs.build-python.result == 'success' || needs.build-python.result == 'skipped')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Download NPM artifacts
        if: needs.detect-language.outputs.has_npm == 'true'
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: npm-dist
          path: npm-artifacts
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Download Python artifacts
        if: needs.detect-language.outputs.has_pypi == 'true'
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-dist
          path: python-artifacts
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Generate changelog
        id: changelog
        run: |
          VERSION=${{ needs.detect-language.outputs.version }}
          
          PREVIOUS_TAG=$(git tag --sort=-v:refname | grep -v "^${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}$" | head -n 1)
          
          if [ -z "$PREVIOUS_TAG" ]; then
            PREVIOUS_TAG=$(git rev-list --max-parents=0 HEAD)
          fi
          
          echo "## What's Changed" > CHANGELOG.md
          echo "" >> CHANGELOG.md
          
          git log ${PREVIOUS_TAG}..HEAD --pretty=format:"- %s (%h)" --no-merges >> CHANGELOG.md
          
          echo "" >> CHANGELOG.md
          echo "" >> CHANGELOG.md
          echo "**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/compare/${PREVIOUS_TAG}...${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}" >> CHANGELOG.md
          
          cat CHANGELOG.md

      - name: Create GitHub Release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
        with:
          name: Release v${{ needs.detect-language.outputs.version }}
          body_path: CHANGELOG.md
          draft: false
          prerelease: ${{ contains(github.ref, 'alpha') || contains(github.ref, 'beta') || contains(github.ref, 'rc') }}
          files: |
            npm-artifacts/dist/**/*
            python-artifacts/**/*
          generate_release_notes: true
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  publish-npm:
    needs: [detect-language, create-release]
    if: needs.detect-language.outputs.has_npm == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Download NPM artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: npm-dist
          path: .

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Publish to npm
        run: |
          if [[ "${{ github.ref }}" == *"alpha"* ]] || [[ "${{ github.ref }}" == *"beta"* ]] || [[ "${{ github.ref }}" == *"rc"* ]]; then
            npm publish --tag next
          else
            npm publish --tag latest
          fi
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}

      - name: Publish to GitHub Packages
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "//npm.pkg.github.com/:_authToken=${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" > .npmrc
          echo "@${{ github.repository_owner }}:registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com" >> .npmrc
          npm publish --registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com
        continue-on-error: true
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  publish-pypi:
    needs: [detect-language, create-release]
    if: needs.detect-language.outputs.has_pypi == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install twine

      - name: Download Python artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-dist
          path: dist/

      - name: Publish to PyPI
        run: twine upload dist/*
        env:
          TWINE_USERNAME: __token__
          TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_TOKEN }}

      - name: Publish to Test PyPI
        if: contains(github.ref, 'alpha') || contains(github.ref, 'beta') || contains(github.ref, 'rc')
        run: twine upload --repository testpypi dist/*
        continue-on-error: true
        env:
          TWINE_USERNAME: __token__
          TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.TEST_PYPI_TOKEN }}

  notify-success:
    needs: [publish-npm, publish-pypi]
    if: always()
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Send notification
        run: |
          echo "Release v${{ needs.detect-language.outputs.version }} completed!"
          echo "NPM: ${{ needs.publish-npm.result }}"
          echo "PyPI: ${{ needs.publish-pypi.result }}"
